sourceName: U.S. Census ACS 2024 5-Year Housing Value and Rent Distribution - Bay Area Counties
category: Aggregate housing value and rent distribution
notes: Official U.S. Census ACS 2020-2024 5-year Data Profile DP04 aggregate county estimates for owner-occupied home value buckets and gross-rent buckets. Covers the nine-county Bay Area. No individual addresses, names, parcel records, sale records, lease records, occupancy records, devices, or household-level records are imported.
